NAVAREA XIX 67/14
BARENTS SEA

1.   SEISMIC VESSEL WG COOK LOST 7000 MTRS.    
      STREAMER CABEL 201028 UTC JUNE 2014 IN    
      POS. 72-06.2N 034-09.1E

      THE CABLE DRIFTING IN APR. DIR. 228DGR 
      0.2KN. MARKED BY YELLOW BUOY WITH  
      STROBE LIGTH
      GUARD VESSEL AQUARIUS STAYS IN THE 
      VICINITY OF THE EQUIPMENT

2.   YELLOW BUOY MARKED BY STROBE LIGTH LOST 
      202130 UTC JUNE 2014 IN POS.72-04.7N  
      032-46.4E 
      YELLOW BUOY MARKED BY STROBE LIGTH LOST 
      202150 UTC JUNE 2014 IN POS.72-08.5N     
      032-37.1E  
      THE BUOYS ARE DRIFTING IN APR. DIR. 235DGR 
      SPEED 0.2KN.

3.    ALL VESSELS IN THE VICINITY KEEP SHARP 
       LOCK OUT AND REPORT TO THE GUARD 
       VESSEL
